|previous=BGMI_Masters_Series{{!}}Season 1 |next=BGMI_Masters_Series/Season_3{{!}}Season 3 }} The '''BGMI Master Series Season 2''' is an offline tournament organised by [https://nodwingaming.com NODWIN Gaming] in collaboration with [https://www.startv.com/about-us/sports/ Star Sports], with a prize pool of ₹2,10,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Stage Host |lang=in |b1=Suren|b1flag=in }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Hindi Studio Host |lang=in |b1=SuperJonny |b2=Bloter }} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Ocean Sharma |b2=KRaT |b3=Fyxs |b4=Phoenix|b4flag=in }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=English Commentator |lang=English |b1=Nekrou |b2=Arka|b2flag=in }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Tamil Commentator |lang=Tamil |b1=MIDFAIL|b1flag=in |b2=Vaadhi|2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== * '''BGMI Masters Series Season 2''' : ''August 4th - 27th ** 24 teams , Squad {{Abbr/TPP}}. ** 14 invited teams , 10 qualified teams. * '''Launch Week''' : ''August 4th - 6th ** 24 teams divied equally into three groups of 8 teams. ** 3 matchdays , round-robin format. ** Total 9 matches - 3 matches per day , each team plays a total of 6 matches. ** Points accumulated in the ''Launch Week'' will be added in the ''Overall leaderboard. * '''Week 1''' : ''August 7th - 13th ** '''League Week 1''' : ''August 7th - 10th *** 24 teams divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams. *** 4 matchdays , round-robin format. *** Total 12 matches - 3 matches per day , each team plays a total of 8 matches. *** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Super Weekend 1''''. ** '''Super Weekend 1''' : ''August 11th - 13th *** 16 teams , 3 matchdays *** 9 matches total , 3 matches each day. *** Points will be added in the Overall leaderboad. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 4 teams}} as per the ''Overall leaderboard'' after ''Super Weekend 1'' qualify for ''Super Weekend 2'' though they will still play ''League Week 2. * '''Week 2''' : ''August 14th - 20th ** '''League Week 2''' : ''August 14th - 17th *** 24 teams divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams. *** 4 matchdays , round-robin format. **** Total 12 matches - 3 matches each day , each team plays a total of 8 matches *** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} along with the {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 4 teams}} of ''Super Weekend 1'' qualify for ''Super Weekend 2''. ** '''Super Weekend 2''' : ''August 18th - 20th *** 16 teams , 3 matchdays *** 9 matches total , 3 matches each day. *** Points will be added in the Overall leaderboad. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} from the ''Overall leaderboard'' qualify for the '''Grand Finals''' ** {{bgcolortext|stay|5th to 20th placed teams}} from the ''Overall leaderboard'' proceed to the '''Playoffs''' ** {{bgcolortext|down|Bottom 4 teams}} from the ''Overall leadrerboard'' are eliminated. * '''Playoffs''' : ''August 22nd - 23rd ** 16 teams , 2 matchdays. ** 6 matches total , 3 matches each day. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 12 teams}} qualify for the '''Grand Finals''' * '''Grand Finals''' : ''August 25th - 27th ** 16 teams. ** 3 matchdays. ** 12 matches total , 4 matches each day. ===Points System=== {{PUBGM 2021 Points System|killterm=elim}} '''Powerplay''' : Double Points for every elimination in the first
